batch_summary: Phase 4 — Booking Flow Screens: All 5 tasks completed.
UI-P4-T01 (Branch): StepIndicator + BranchCard list + skeleton/empty/error states + Continue button.
UI-P4-T02 (Doctor): No Preference card + DoctorCard list with isSelected + skeleton/empty/error states.
UI-P4-T03 (Date/Time): table_calendar + TimeSlotChip grid + month navigation + skeleton/empty/error states.
UI-P4-T04 (Confirm): Summary AppCard + disclaimer banner + WhatsApp deep link + Book Another button.
UI-P4-T05 (My Bookings): Paginated AppointmentCard list + skeleton/empty/error states + scroll-to-load-more.
All tasks: V2 design system compliant (no hardcoded colors/fonts/sizes, dark mode, all states covered).
1 task remaining in Phase 4 backlog: UI-P4-T06 (Appointment Detail Screen).
